arts.ttl: Champions League Preview: Inter vs Feyenoord – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Stadio San Siro forms the backdrop for the return leg of a nearly-decided Champions League last-16 tie between Inter and Feyenoord. Simone Inzaghi's side set one foot in the quarter-finals after a comfortable 2-0 first-leg win in Rotterdam.
